channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Over 80% of Bitcoin ETF assets hit Coinbase custody choke point with $74B at risk

item.title: 86% of businesses refused to pay cyber ransoms in 2025 — Coalition Insurance
item.description: Two firms recently told DataBreaches that about 30% or more of their clients pay ransom after a cyberattack. But you may get a different impression from other findings. The Actuary reports: Initial ra...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Capita under investigation after workers hit by pensions data breach
item.description: Rob White reports: A major pensions administrator is under investigation after admitting its second data breach in three years, the Government has confirmed. Capita, which runs the Civil Service Pensi...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Madras High Court Dismisses Plea By Cyber Security Expert Seeking Probe Into Star Health Security Lapses
item.description: Upasana Sajeev reports an update to a case previously noted on this site: The Madras High Court has dismissed an appeal filed by cybersecurity specialist Himanshu Pathak against a single judge’s order...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Webinar: From noise to signal - What threat actors are targeting next
item.description: Threat actors often signal their intentions before launching attacks, from dark web chatter to access-broker listings and credential requests. Join our upcoming webinar with Flare Systems to learn how...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: A hacker has allegedly breached one of China’s supercomputers and is attempting to sell a trove of stolen data
item.description: Isaac Yee reports: A hacker has allegedly stolen a massive trove of sensitive data – including highly classified defense documents and missile schematics – from a state-run Chinese supercomputer in wh...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: The Hidden Security Risks of Shadow AI in Enterprises
item.description: As AI tools become more accessible, employees are adopting them without formal approval from IT and security teams. While these tools may boost productivity, automate tasks, or fill gaps in existing w...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Adobe Reader Zero-Day Exploited via Malicious PDFs Since December 2025
item.description: Threat actors have been exploiting a previously unknown zero-day vulnerability in Adobe Reader using maliciously crafted PDF documents since at least December 2025. The finding, detailed by EXPMON's H...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Bitter-Linked Hack-for-Hire Campaign Targets Journalists Across MENA Region
item.description: An apparent hack-for-hire campaign likely orchestrated by a threat actor with suspected ties to the Indian government targeted journalists, activists, and government officials across the Middle East a...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Trump’s Personnel Agency Is Asking for Federal Workers’ Medical Records
item.description: I posted the following article this morning over on PogoWasRight.org, but I have had so many people sending me links to stories about this news that I guess I should have posted it here, too, as a fut...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Russia's Forest Blizzard Nabs Rafts of Logins via SOHO Routers
item.description: Heard of fileless malware? How about malwareless cyber espionage? Russia's APT28 is spying on global organizations by modifying just one DNS setting in vulnerable routers....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: OCR Releases Risk Management Video
item.description: From HHS OCR: This video presentation is intended to raise awareness and provide practical education to HIPAA covered entities and business associates of the HIPAA Security Rule’s Risk Management requ...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Threat Actors Get Crafty With Emojis to Escape Detection
item.description: When 🤖 means "bot available," 🧰 signifies "toolkit," or 💰💰💰 translates to "big ransom," bad actors can evade filters and keep it all on the down-low....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading
